  • tests package
  • tests.soil_crop_tests package

  • tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data module
  • View page source

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_get_vectorized_layer_attribute() → None

ensures that layer data can be vectorized.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_set_vectorized_layer_attribute() → None

ensures that layer attributes are properly set

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_manual_soil_data_configuration() → None

Test that creating a custom SoilData object actually has all the correct values in its fields

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_error_manual_soil_data_configuration() → None

Test that an error is correctly raised when an invalid input is used to create SoilData object.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_annual_reset() → None

Test that annual_reset() actually resets the values it should

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_soil_water_content() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates amount of water in the entire soil profile

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_saturation() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the amount of water in soil profile when completely saturated

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_field_capacity() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the amount of water in the soil profile when at field capacity

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_soil_water_factor(profile_water: float, profile_field_capacity: float, expected: float) → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the soil water factor for a soil profile.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_bulk_density(layers: List[LayerData]) → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates average bulk density of soil profile, weighted by layer thickness

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_nitrates_total(layers: List[LayerData]) → None

Test that SoilData correctly sums nitrates contained in soil profile

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_total_residue(mocker: MockerFixture, residues: list[float], expected: float) → None

Tests the property method total_residue sums up the residues correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_soil_data_post_init_error() → None

Test that the correct errors were thrown when incorrect values were used in post init

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_cover_factor(cover_type: str) → None

Test that the cover factor method returns the correct value for each time or else gives the right error

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_zero_silt_clay_warning(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the case when silt and clay are zero.
